steps.title: Locate the input on the graph
steps.content: The notation $f(5)$ means the $y$-value of the graph when $x=5$. Find $x=5$ on the horizontal axis.

steps.title: Read the function value
steps.content: From $x=5$, move vertically to the graph and read the corresponding $y$-value. The graph shows $f(5)=3$. The answer is B.
